summary.what: Fix HasPendingCommits false-positive on ledger-only commits
summary.why: Naive HEAD-vs-anchor check always triggered after timbers log because auto-committed entry changed HEAD — the ~15ms fast path trade-off was unacceptable since it blocked every session end
summary.how: Delegate to GetPendingCommits which filters ledger-only commits via CommitFilesMulti batch lookup; preserve fresh-repo exemption by checking latest==nil

notes: The original plan noted 'may false-positive on ledger-only commits; acceptable trade-off for ~15ms' but testing in a real repo immediately revealed it blocks every session end. The fast path saved ~85ms per call but made the Stop hook useless. GetPendingCommits adds one more git subprocess (CommitFilesMulti) but runs once per session — acceptable.
